channel.title: Jumbo on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in Jumbo on Tech Tracker

item.title: Jumbo - Now protect your online data using this privacy assistant.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-FkYM4iuSiy0/YjOHiiD5PLI/AAAAAAAAJu0/DjR1tpuSF2Q0IXjpKNJ2KnZycnUNPnZEACNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1647544199812454-0.png" alt=""> Privacy and security is essential for every human being in this world, most countries in thier constitution including security and privacy related laws for its citizens, but as you may know we’re in modern and digital era where private details of people can be stored in cloud servers, which are targeted and exploited by hackers for personal gain or sell to companies for quick money even leak them online for fame.
